column5:
There are Variation properties that can be set up both for the Main product and its Variation. For this Test-case, Variation Properties should be set up  __only__ for the Variation, not for the Main Product. Better to check on the Carriage bolt Catalog.

1. Product_1 has Variation_1 
2. Product_1 __does not have set up Variation Properties__ (Go to Admin BackEnd > Catalog > Product_1 > widget Properties > Variation property > There is should NOT be set up Variation Propety (for example FASTENER LENGTH)
3. Variation_1 __has set up Variation property__ (Go to Admin BackEnd > Catalog > Product_1 > widget Variations > Variation_1 > widget Properties > Variation property > There is should be set up Variation Propety (for example FASTENER LENGTH) > add any value (for example 1")
4. Filters include FASTENER LENGTH (Go to Admin BackEnd  >  Store  > B2b store > Agregation properties widget > Add FASTENER LENGTH to the Right column.
5. Product_1 exists in the Catalog_1 (Carriage bolts)
